titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 732

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=972 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:12:46.014679+00 | translation moa=973 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:12:46.003973+00

p.cl: Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos prefatas scriptum peruenerit  Walterus Olifard Salutem in domino .

Nouerit Vniuersitas uestra
me confirmasse Deo et Sancto Chudberto Et Sancte Ebbe Et Monachis Dunelmensibus apud Coldingham Deo seruientibus donacionem
illam quam Clarebaldus de Esseby fecit deo et sancto Chudberto et sancte Ebbe et monachis de Coldingham ibidem deo seruientibus de duabus piscariis super Twedam . scilicet de vna piscaria sub Gardino de fissewich’ . et alia apud Schipeswel .
sicut continetur in carta quam dictus Clarebaldus dedit dictis monachis de dictis piscariis . quas ego dedi et concessi et
carta mea confirmaui dicto Clarebaldo et heredibus suis pro homagio et seruicio suo

Et in huius confirmacionis
testimonium presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui .
To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Walter Oliphant sends greeting in the Lord.

Know all of you that I have confirmed to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Ebbe, and to the monks of Durham serving God at Coldingham, the donation which Clarebald of Ashby made to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Ebbe, and to the monks of Coldingham serving God in that place, of two fisheries on the Tweed, that is, one fishery below the garden at Fishwick, and the other at Shipswell, as it is comprised in the charter which the said Clarebald gave to the said monks for the said fisheries, which I gave, granted, and by my charter made firm to the said Clarebald and his heirs in return for their homage and service.
And as witness of this confirmation I have applied my seal to the present writing.
